footer.brandText: Caring for your mental well-being with love and professionalism.

hero.title: You are not alone.
hero.subtitle: Find professional support and manage your mental well-being with Take Care. A safe and compassionate space for your path toward healing and peace of mind.

card1.title: Clinical Excellence
card1.text: Access top-tier psychologists and psychiatrists with verified backgrounds and full licenses.

card2.title: Radical Privacy
card2.text: Your sessions and data are your business. We use military-grade encryption to keep them that way.

card3.title: Seamless Booking
card3.text: Forget the calls. Book, reschedule, or cancel appointments directly through our intuitive calendar.

cta.title: Ready to begin your journey?
cta.text: Join thousands of people who have taken the first step toward a healthier mind.

hero.title: User administration
hero.subtitle: View, search, and manage registered patients and specialists in Take Care.

admin.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, surname or email

empty.validations: There are no pending requests to review.

modal.title: Confirm suspension
modal.text: Are you sure you want to suspend user

errors.processValidation: The operation could not be completed on the server

login.title: Your safe space starts here
login.subtitle: Take Care: Your mental well-being is our priority.

notFound.title: It looks like you’ve gone off track
notFound.text: Don’t worry, we’re here to help. The page you’re looking for doesn’t exist or has been moved.

patientDashboard.subtitle: Your mental well-being is our priority today.

section.title: Upcoming consultations
section.text: Your scheduled session details will appear here.

patientProfile.title: Edit profile
patientProfile.subtitle: Update your information and improve your presence on TakeCare.

messages.connectionError: Connection error. Check your internet and try again.
messages.updateConnectionError: Error updating profile. Please try again.

patientSearch.title: Find a specialist
patientSearch.subtitle: Browse active and verified specialists to continue your care process.
patientSearch.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, specialty or location
patientSearch.cardNote: Soon you will be able to review more details and request an appointment from here.

states.emptyTitle: We couldn't find specialists for that criteria
states.emptyText: Try another name, specialty or location to expand the results.

fallback.biography: This specialist has not added a public biography yet.

recoverPassword.title: Recover password
recoverPassword.subtitle: Don’t worry, tell us the email associated with your account and we’ll send you the instructions
recoverPassword.successText1: We have sent a recovery link to
recoverPassword.alertMessage: If the email exists, you will receive a link soon.

registerPatient.title: Patient Registration
registerPatient.subtitle: Create your account to begin your mental health care process.
registerPatient.sectionHelp: Upload your identity document and a selfie to validate your account.

terms.text2: I understand how my health data will be managed.

names.minlength: First names must have at least 3 characters
names.maxlength: First names cannot have more than 30 characters
names.pattern: Only letters and spaces are allowed

firstLastname.minlength: First last name must have at least 3 characters
firstLastname.maxlength: First last name cannot have more than 30 characters
firstLastname.pattern: Only letters and spaces are allowed

secondLastname.minlength: Second last name must have at least 3 characters
secondLastname.maxlength: Second last name cannot have more than 30 characters
secondLastname.pattern: Only letters and spaces are allowed

ci.minlength: ID number must have at least 6 characters
ci.maxlength: ID number cannot have more than 10 characters
ci.pattern: Only numbers and suffix are allowed.

password.minlength: Password must contain between 8 and 50 characters

terms.required: You must accept the terms to continue.

toast.successMessage: Your registration was successful. Redirecting to login...
toast.invalidEmailMessage: The email address entered is invalid or already registered. Please verify and try again.
toast.duplicateCiMessage: The ID number entered is already registered in the system.
toast.invalidPasswordMessage: The password does not meet the minimum security requirements.
toast.incompleteDataMessage: Some fields are invalid. Please check that all information is entered correctly.
toast.existingAccountMessage: An account with that email or ID number already exists. Maybe you already have an account?
toast.invalidInfoMessage: Some data does not have the expected format. Please review the birth date and email.
toast.serverErrorMessage: A problem occurred on our servers. Please try again in a few minutes.
toast.noConnectionMessage: Could not connect to the server. Check your internet connection and try again.
toast.genericErrorMessage: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

registerRole.titlePart1: How would you like to use
registerRole.subtitle: Select the option that best fits your situation.

patient.title: I need support
patient.description: I am looking for a qualified therapist to help me improve my well-being.

specialist.title: I am a specialist
specialist.description: I am a certified professional who wants to help patients.

registerSpecialist.title: Specialist Registration
registerSpecialist.subtitle: Join our network of mental health professionals and start helping others.
registerSpecialist.footerNote: ⓘ Your profile will be reviewed by the administrator

uploads.certifications: ➕ Drag or click to upload PDFs

terms.text2: I understand how my health data will be managed.

firstName.pattern: First name must contain letters only.
firstName.maxlength: First name must have a maximum of 30 characters.
firstName.minlength: First name must have at least 3 characters.

lastName1.pattern: Last name must contain letters only.
lastName1.maxlength: Last name must have a maximum of 30 characters.
lastName1.minlength: Last name must have at least 3 characters.

lastName2.pattern: Second last name must contain letters only.
lastName2.maxlength: Second last name must have a maximum of 30 characters.
lastName2.minlength: Second last name must have at least 3 characters.

document.minlength: Identity document must have at least 6 characters.
document.maxlength: Identity document must have a maximum of 10 characters.
document.pattern: Identity document can only contain numbers and letters.

idPhoto.required: You must upload a photo of your identity card showing the document number.

specialties.required: You must select at least one specialty.

certifications.required: You must upload at least one PDF document.

terms.required: You must accept the terms to continue.

toast.successMessage: Your profile will be reviewed and we will notify you by email.
toast.invalidEmailMessage: The entered email is invalid or already in use. Please verify and try again.
toast.duplicateDocumentMessage: The entered document number is already registered in the system.
toast.invalidPasswordMessage: The password does not meet the minimum security requirements.
toast.incompleteDataMessage: Please check that all required fields are correctly filled before continuing.
toast.existingAccountMessage: There is already a specialist registered with that email or identity document.
toast.invalidInfoMessage: Some data does not have the expected format. Please check the birth date and email.
toast.serverErrorMessage: A problem occurred on our servers. Please try again in a few minutes.
toast.noConnectionMessage: Could not connect to the server. Check your internet connection and try again.
toast.genericErrorMessage: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
toast.specialtyRequiredMessage: Select at least one specialty to continue.
toast.documentsRequiredMessage: You must upload at least one certificate or credential in PDF format.
toast.idPhotoRequiredMessage: Upload a photo of the front side of your identity card.
toast.formIncompleteMessage: Check that all required fields are correctly filled out.

section.text: The specialist's sessions will be displayed here.

specialistProfile.subtitle: Update your information and improve your presence on TakeCare.

location.title: Professional location
location.subtitle: Register the place where you provide in-person care and decide how visible it should be to patients.

placeholders.addressLine: Ex: America Ave #123, Health Center Building
placeholders.reference: Ex: In front of the square or office floor

visibility.title: Location privacy
visibility.help: Choose whether the location can be shown publicly or remain private until manual confirmation.

location.note: For now, the full address and privacy preference are stored only on the frontend. The current backend will still receive a summarized location.

validation.cityRequired: Enter the city where you provide care.
